hero.headline: Designing the Future of AI
hero.description: Full-Stack Software Engineer passionate about AI, Frontend, Backend, Databases, and Machine Learning. I design scalable systems that combine clean architecture, performance, and intelligent user experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I build scalable systems from backend to frontend, connecting strong architecture with real user impact.
about.interestsText: I’m passionate about pushing my limits in sports—especially triathlon and cycling—where discipline and perseverance keep me striving for progress. The beauty of nature and travel inspires me, and I treasure every adventure, from local rides to journeys through places like the Galapagos. My community—friends, family, and teammates—are an essential part of my story, fueling my growth and motivation every day. Creativity drives me, whether I’m exploring new hobbies like painting or experimenting with 3D printing. I believe that real growth comes from embracing the process, finding joy in every challenge and lesson. Above all, I value gratitude, resilience, and making meaningful memories along the way.

cards.title: My Vision
cards.description: To bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and production-ready software, creating systems that are both intelligent and reliable at scale.

cards.title: My Expectations
cards.description: I hold myself to high standards of code quality, performance, and user experience. Every project is an opportunity to raise the bar and deliver meaningful impact.

cards.title: Future Focus
cards.description: Exploring the intersection of AI agents, full-stack architecture, and developer tooling to build the next generation of intelligent applications.

selfLearner.title: Self-Learner
selfLearner.description: Constantly expanding my skill set through hands-on experimentation, open-source contributions, and deep dives into emerging technologies.

curiosityDriven.title: Curiosity-Driven
curiosityDriven.description: I approach every problem with genuine curiosity, asking "why" before "how" to uncover solutions that address root causes, not just symptoms.

responsibleDeveloper.title: Responsible Developer
responsibleDeveloper.description: I believe in writing code that is maintainable, accessible, and ethical — building software that serves people and stands the test of time.
